title: Enter the Bungeon
description: Completely rewrites Minecraft into a Roguelike Dungeon Crawler
body:
This project has also been bundled into a [Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/enter-the-bungeon-modpack) for faster installation. This Datapack completely removes the vanilla minecraft experience and replaces it with a Dungeon Crawler Roguelike. Initially starting as a project i made for fun, to see how far you could push minecraft as a game engine, eventually leading to this. It features completely custom generation, enemies, bosses, upgrades and much more, maybe even some lore..? It is also compatible with multiplayer, so can play this with as many friends as you want, and i strongly recommend doing so. Using [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) or [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) is recommended for hosting a world easily. ## Gameplay The game stays almost completely true to the roguelike genre, with the only real thing carrying over between runs being weather or not you won the game. Each time you enter the bungeon you will experince a completely random assortment of enemies, upgrades and items. Currently only 1 out of the 5 planned floor types is implementented, meaning the total amount of floors is 3 at the moment. That does not mean it will be an easy feat to complete, the enemies and amount of rooms scale quickly the further you go. ## Credits [Pengu](https://penguh.carrd.co/) - Sword and revolver model [Terraria](https://terraria.org/) - Some sound effects [Animated Java ](https://animated-java.dev/) - All animated entities **Translations**
ZeroIceBear - Simplified Chinese
